sentences.arabic: زُرْتُ مَدِينَةً قَدِيمَةً مَشْهُورَةً بِآثَارِهَا التَّارِيخِيَّةِ الْعَظِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Posjetio sam stari grad poznat po svojim velikim historijskim spomenicima.
sentences.translationEn: I visited an old city famous for its great historical monuments.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَخْدَمْتُ الْخَرِيطَةَ لِلْبَحْثِ عَنِ الْمَتَاحِفِ وَالْمَسَاجِدِ الْأَثَرِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Koristio sam mapu kako bih pronašao muzeje i drevne džamije.
sentences.translationEn: I used the map to search for museums and ancient mosques.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْجَوُّ مُشْمِسًا وَجَمِيلًا جِدًّا لِلتَّجَوُّلِ فِي الشَّوَارِعِ.
sentences.translation: Vrijeme je bilo sunčano i veoma lijepo za šetnju ulicama.
sentences.translationEn: The weather was very sunny and beautiful for wandering the streets.

sentences.translation: Napravio sam mnogo fotografija starih građevina.
sentences.translationEn: I took many photos of the old buildings.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَيْتُ بَعْضَ الْهَدَايَا التَّذْكَارِيَّةِ لِأَصْدِقَائِي قَبْلَ الْعَوْدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kupio sam neke suvenire za svoje prijatelje prije povratka.
sentences.translationEn: I bought some souvenirs for my friends before returning.
